name: Data Split into Pieces (Unix)
notes:
This rule detects data split into pieces.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: 'Igor Fits, oscd.community'
SIGMA Title: Split A File Into Pieces - Linux
SIGMA Description: 'Detection use of the command "split" to split files into parts and possible transfer.'


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Type") == 'syscall' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'split' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Data Split into Pieces (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Type") == 'syscall' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'split' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Data Split into Pieces
Event description: Detects data split into pieces.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
